name: Parsley Fried Onion Rings
recipeIngredient: 3/4 tsp Salt plus additional for sprinkling
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk the beer into the flour until the batter is smooth and whisk in the parsley.
2. Let the batter stand for 30 minutes and stir in 3/4 tsp salt.
3. Cut the onion crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick slices and separate them into rings.
4. In a large, deep skillet, heat 1 inch of oil to 380°F (200°C).
5. Working in batches of 4 or 5 onion rings, dip each ring through the batter to coat completely, letting excess drip off, and fry, turning occasionally until golden, about 1 to 2 minutes.
6. With tongs, transfer the fried rings to paper towels to drain excess oil.
7. Season with additional salt if desired.
8. Serve the onion rings with Salsa Verde.
